nasb.text: And you shall not leave any of it over until morning, but whatever is left of it until morning, you shall burn with fire.

esv.text: And you shall let none of it remain until the morning; anything that remains until the morning you shall burn.

cnv.text: 你們一點也不可留到早晨；如果有一點留到早晨，就要用火燒掉。

ccb.text: 不可把肉留到早晨，留到早晨的肉要烧掉。
